title: 24 Thank You Cards Pack with Gold Foil Stickers and Kraft Envelopes, 12.5 x 12.5 cm – Blank Inside – Ideal for Teachers, Weddings, Kids, Christmas – Made in the UK
features: ✔ ELEGANT THANK YOU CARD DESIGN: Express your gratitude in style with this minimalist card featuring the heartfelt message: “Just a little card to say a very big thank you!” A simple yet elegant way to show appreciation.
✔ PACKAGE INCLUDES: The Giftinghouse Thank You Cards Pack comes with 24 gold-foil thank you stickers and matching kraft envelopes, making it easy to share your appreciation with someone special.

✔ IDEAL DIMENSIONS: Each thank you card measures 12.5 x 12.5 cm (150 x 150 mm), offering plenty of space for your message. The blank inside allows you to personalize every card with your heartfelt words.

✔ SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Giftinghouse thank you cards are perfect for year-round use. Whether for teachers, weddings, graduations, bridal or baby showers, Christmas, birthdays, or more, these versatile and stylish cards are ideal for any occasion—even for kids.

✔ ETHICAL & ECO-FRIENDLY: Join us in our commitment to the environment. As an ethical and environmentally conscious small business, we ensure that our thank you cards are fully recyclable and plastic-free, crafted from high-quality 250 GSM paper.
🇬🇧 MADE IN THE UK: Giftinghouse thank you cards are designed, printed, and packed in the UK using high-quality materials.
description: ✔ PACKAGE: 👉 24 Thank You Cards 👉 24 Gold-Embossed Thank You Stickers 👉 24 Kraft Envelopes ✔ IDEAL DIMENSIONS: 👉 150 x 150 mm – spacious yet compact. ✔ HIGH-QUALITY: 👉 Fully recyclable, plastic-free, and designed for a premium look and feel. Proudly designed, printed, and packed in the UK. ✔ LUXURY ECO-FRIENDLY CARD: 👉 Ethically made and environmentally friendly. Printed on high-quality paperboard using vegetable-based inks. 🔹 MADE IN THE UK 🔹
